flat.$description: No elevation. Inline elements, disabled states, flat table rows, background fills.

xs.$description: Barely lifted. Input fields on hover, subtle chip surfaces, table row hover state.

sm.$description: Resting card. Default card, list container, form group — the most-used elevation in CropLens dashboard.

md.$description: Raised card. Hovered card state, active panel, open accordion.

sm.$description: Small floating UI. Tooltips, popovers, select dropdowns, date pickers, context menus.

md.$description: Modal-level. Dialogs, confirmation modals, side sheets, image lightbox.

lg.$description: Maximum. Full-screen overlays, command palette, global search, critical alert dialogs.

inset.$description: Sunken surface. Input fields in focus/filled state, pressed button active state, well containers, map overlays in field view.

default.$description: Brand focus ring. Apply to ALL interactive elements on keyboard focus: buttons, inputs, links, select, checkbox, radio, switch, tab. Required for WCAG 2.4.7.

error.$description: Error focus ring. Replace default focus ring on invalid form fields. Signals both focus AND error state simultaneously.
